     … because …" -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Rough shape of the API / config / behavior change. YAML snippets
     and Rust signatures help. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Why not a smaller workaround? Other designs you thought about? -->

## Subsystem

- [ ] Agent runtime / session manager
- [ ] Event bus / broker
- [ ] LLM providers
- [ ] Plugin (WhatsApp / Telegram / Browser / Email / Google)
- [ ] Memory (STM / LTM / vector)
- [ ] Extensions / MCP
- [ ] TaskFlow
- [ ] Soul / dreaming / workspace-git
- [ ] Docker / native install / Termux
- [ ] Docs / CLI / operational tooling
- [ ] Other

## Scope

- [ ] Small — single file / crate, behavior-preserving
- [ ] Medium — needs new config field or public type
- [ ] Large — new phase / subsystem (expect a `/forge brainstorm` round)

## Breaking change?

- [ ] No — purely additive, existing configs keep working
- [ ] Yes — would require a migration note in the docs

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] I'd like guidance first
- [ ] I'm only flagging the idea
